title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. penicillatum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. penicillatum, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. penicillatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
